The '''Advisory Council''' was a seven-being body that advised the [[Chief of State (Alliance)/Legends|Chief of State]] in the operations of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].

==Organization==
As mandated by the [[Corellian Treaty]], the Council's seven members were chosen as representatives of the [[Allied Command|Allied governments]] "who have given the most lives to the battle against the Emperor." By this definition, [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] should have taken a seat on the Council, as [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] was still considered to be an Allied government even after its [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|destruction]]. However, she refused the position, preferring to focus her efforts elsewhere.<ref name="RASB" />

Legally, the Council's only power was to approve or disapprove of the Chief of State's policy decisions, and could remove the Chief of State and call for a new election with a two-thirds majority. The Treaty also mandated that after the Alliance's victory, the Council would assume Executive Power and convene a [[Constitutional Convention]] to determine the shape of the [[New Republic/Legends|Second Galactic Republic]] that would be formed.<ref name="RASB" />

==History==
Shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the Council consisted of at least three [[Human/Legends|Humans]], a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]], a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]], and an [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]].<ref name="RASB" />

[[Vin Northal/Legends|Vin Northal]], a former [[Emperor's Royal Guard/Legends|Emperor's Royal Guard]] who defected to the Alliance, single-handedly [[Ambush on Hythrope IV|saved]] the entire Council from capture on [[Hythrope IV]].<ref name="CRO-">''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]''</ref>
